headline: Assessing Deckers Outdoor’s (DECK) Valuation After Recent Analyst Upgrades And Earnings Optimism
summary: Recent analyst upgrades for Deckers Outdoor (DECK), including a Zacks Rank #1, have put the stock in focus as investors weigh upbeat earnings revisions against the company’s recent share price performance. See our latest analysis for Deckers Outdoor. At a share price of US$105.26, Deckers Outdoor has seen short term pressure, with a 30 day share price return of an 8.83% decline and a 7 day return of a 4.19% decline, even as recent analyst upgrades and product launches like Teva’s expanded...
